reasons.moralisPossibleSpam: Moralis flagged this asset as possible spam.
reasons.moralisVerifiedContract: Moralis marked this contract as verified.
reasons.alchemyMissingPrice: Alchemy did not return a reliable price for this asset.
reasons.missingLogo: This asset is missing a logo or thumbnail.
reasons.missingMetadata: This asset is missing enough metadata to classify confidently.
reasons.suspiciousSymbol: The symbol or name looks suspicious or impersonates another asset.
reasons.zeroOrDustValue: The priced value is dust-sized or effectively zero.
reasons.unrecognizedContract: This contract is not recognized by the known protocol sources for this stage.
reasons.knownAerodromeToken: This asset matches Aerodrome token metadata for Base.
reasons.knownProtocolContract: This asset matches known protocol metadata for this wallet view.
reasons.hasReliablePrice: A reliable address-based price was resolved for this asset.
reasons.userHidden: Reserved for a future user-hidden override.
reasons.userAllowed: Reserved for a future user-allowed override.

helpers.reasonFallback: No additional trust signals were recorded.
